case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. JOSE ISAIAS ASCENCIO VANEGAS

docket_entries.description: SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) VERONICA ROSALES. FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-19-2023 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO OCT-12-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES, ASSISTANT MANAGER. DEFENDANT JOSE ISAIAS ASENCIO VANEGAS IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-12-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-11-2024 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES (ASSISTANT MANAGER) WHO IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETER MONICA HERNANDEZ (#301545). DEFENDANT JOSE ISAIAS ASCENCIO VANEGAS IS PRESENT. PARTIES REACH A SETTLEMENT OUTSIDE THE COURTROOM, THE SPECIFIC TERMS OF WHICH THE PARTIES HAVE NOT YET FINALIZED. THE COURT CONTINUES THIS MATTER FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF THE PARTIES' SETTLEMENT IS UNSUCCESSFUL, PARTIES MUST APPEAR AT THE NEXT COURT DATE FOR A TRIAL ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES BY THE PARTIES AT THE NEXT COURT DATE, THE COURT WILL DISMISS THIS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PER THE PARTIES' SETTLEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CURTIS SMOLAR; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VANEGAS, JOSE ISAIAS ASCENCIO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VANEGAS, JOSE ISAIAS ASCENCIO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-11-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES CHANG. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER NINA SAFDIE. PLAINTIFF'S SC-109 IS ON FILE. DEFENDANT JOSE ISAIAS ASCENCIO VANEGAS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT VANEGAS, JOSE ISAIAS ASCENCIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-19-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
